directive.title: Immutable audit_logs table and POST /api/audit endpoint

auditor.summary: The generated code successfully implements the immutable audit log infrastructure per the directive. All 19 acceptance criteria pass. The SQL migration creates the audit_logs table with proper columns, indexes, and REVOKE permissions. The Drizzle schema correctly maps all columns with TypeScript type exports. The API route is strictly POST-only with Zod validation, proper error handling, and Cache-Control headers. The test suite covers 12 of the specified test cases with proper mocking. Two minor issues: missing test for invalid JSON body response and missing Cache-Control header assertions. The build is production-ready with minor test coverage gaps.

top_issues.description: Test for invalid JSON body is missing - only route.ts handles it but no test case verifies the 400 response for malformed JSON
Cache-Control header is not explicitly tested in any test case
